steps.title: Find the sample margin
steps.content:
From the table, Angel Cruz has $483$ votes and Terry Smith has $320$ votes. The sample margin is:
$$
483-320=163
$$

steps.title: Scale to the full election
steps.content:
The full election total is $6{,}424$, and the poll total is $803$:
$$
\frac{6{,}424}{803}=8
$$
So the expected margin is:
$$
163\cdot 8=1{,}304
$$

steps.title: Choose the expected margin
steps.content: Angel Cruz would be expected to win by $1{,}304$ votes. The answer is B.
